description_long: A cluster of four pastel mint-green latex balloons is shown, each balloon appearing smooth and glossy with a subtle sheen. The balloons are round and evenly inflated, giving them a plump, buoyant appearance. Thin white strings are attached to the bottom of each balloon, converging downward, suggesting they are meant to be held or anchored. On at least two of the balloons, faint printed text reading 'Happy Birthday' is visible, adding a celebratory touch. The balloons are grouped closely together, creating a festive and cheerful arrangement suitable for parties or urban celebrations. The overall look is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with a soft, inviting color palette.
description: A cluster of four mint-green latex balloons with white strings and faint 'Happy Birthday' text, arranged in a festive group. The balloons are glossy, smooth, and fully inflated.
description_view_0: Three mint-green balloons are most visible, with one partially obscured behind, and all four strings are visible.
description_view_1: All four balloons are clearly visible, tightly grouped, with strings hanging straight down.
description_view_2: The balloons are seen from a slight angle, showing the roundness and the convergence of the strings.
description_view_3: The 'Happy Birthday' text is most visible on two balloons, with three balloons facing forward and one partially behind.
